owners.scope: New (incl. New Presentation Ctrl+N), Open, Templates submenus
Save As, Export, Export As PDF, Print
Full dialog: 6 tabs (General, Initial View, User Interface, Links, Security, Digital Signatures)
Slide thumbnails, drag-to-reorder, right-click context menu (New/Duplicate/Delete/Rename/Hide)
Slide section: Format dropdown (4:3/16:9/Letter/etc.), Orientation dropdown
Slide section: Master Slide dropdown, Master Background/Objects checkboxes, Master View button
Layouts grid: 3x4 layout thumbnails for the current slide
Slide menu: New Slide (Ctrl+M), Duplicate Slide, Delete Slide, Rename Slide, Summary Slide
Slide menu: Change Slide Master, Slide Properties, Set Background Image
Slide menu: Slide Transition opens transition panel
Slide Show menu: Start, Slide Show Settings (kiosk mode, looping)
Image entry: file-browser dialog with Preview/Link checkboxes
Table entry: Insert Table dialog (rows/columns)
Object > Formula entry — opens LibreOffice Math editor as OLE object
Text Box entry (F2)
Hyperlink entry (Ctrl+K) — Hyperlink dialog with Internet/Mail/Document/New Document tabs
Character submenu / Character dialog; Paragraph dialog; Text submenu (Bold/Italic/case)
Bullets and Numbering dialog; Spacing submenu (line spacing)
Line dialog, Area dialog (fill color, gradient, hatching, bitmap)
Position and Size dialog (F4) — Position/Size/Rotation/Slant tabs
Align Objects submenu, Distribute Selection submenu
Character dialog (Fonts, Font Effects, Position, Highlighting tabs); Paragraph dialog (Indents/Spacing, Alignment, Tabs)
Bullets and Numbering dialog: Unordered/Ordered/Outline/Image tabs, Customize tab for character/color/size
Flowchart Shapes split button (palette: terminator, process, decision, etc.); Connectors split button (straight/curved/elbow)
Block Arrows split button (chevrons, pentagons); Basic Shapes (rectangle, trapezoid for funnel segments)
Rectangle, Basic Shapes (rounded rectangle), Connectors split button
Line Color and Fill Color split buttons (color palette dropdown)
Rotate button, Align/Distribute split buttons
New, Open icons (mostly redundant with File menu)
Export Directly as PDF icon, Print icon (redundant with File menu)
Insert Table dropdown (row/column grid picker)

standard-toolbar.drop_reason: Touches many guides only weakly; nearly all entries are redundant with the corresponding menu regions (file-menu, insert-menu). Inlining would bloat each guide with content that already appears via its menu region.

owners.scope: Text frame interaction: single-click selects, double-click enters text editing
Right-click on object > Position and Size

canvas-statusbar.drop_reason: Mostly app-wide click semantics. Position-and-Size is already covered by format-menu region. Status bar info (zoom, slide count) is informational, not actionable for any specific task.

edit-view-menus.drop_reason: Edit menu (clipboard, Find, Undo) and View menu (panels, zoom, master view) are app-wide. No specific task guide is the right owner. Master View is already covered by properties-sidebar (Master View button) and slide-slideshow-menus (Slide menu's Change Slide Master).

summary.uncovered_note: image-embedding (Edit > Links to External Files dialog) was not explored by any worker — extending the plan to cover it is optional.
